description: Create a Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/micro_enterprise_analysis.ipynb to analyze the employment size of business buildings in San Francisco using the 'jobs', 'buildings', and 'parcels' tables from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. The analysis should categorize buildings with at least one job into three tiers: Micro/Small (1-10 jobs), Medium (11-50 jobs), and Large (51+ jobs). Aggregate these buildings by zone_id to calculate the following metrics: total_business_bldgs, micro_small_bldgs, medium_bldgs, large_bldgs, micro_small_bldg_pct (0-100), total_jobs, micro_small_jobs, and micro_small_job_pct (0-100). Filter for zones with at least 20 business buildings and identify the top 15 zones based on the highest micro_small_bldg_pct. Export the top 15 results to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/top_micro_enterprise_zones.csv and create a stacked horizontal bar chart of the building size counts for these zones, saved to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/business_size_composition.png. All notebook cells must be executed.
